name: Poule D'eau Jambalaya
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown sausage in a black iron pot (10 Quart or larger) over medium heat for 10 minutes. Remove and set aside.
2. Add rabbit to the residual juices in the pot and cook uncovered over medium heat until well browned.
3. Add onions and garlic, cook covered until onions become transparent.
4. Add Ro-Tel, pick pepper, and mushrooms (including juice) and cook covered over low heat for 30 minutes.
5. Add celery, shallots, bell peppers, and salt to taste, and cook covered over low heat for 20 minutes.
6. Add hot water as necessary to achieve the desired consistency of stew.
7. Turn the heat to high. When boiling (rolling), add bay leaves, parsley, rice, and sausage. Mix well.
8. Cook uncovered on high until liquid reduces to the level of the rice.
9. Cover and cook over low heat for 30 minutes. Stir occasionally until done.
